questions.question: What does 妈妈 mean?
questions.explanation: 妈妈 (māma) = mother. Father is 爸爸 (bàba).

questions.question: What does 哥哥 mean?
questions.explanation: 哥哥 (gēge) = older brother. 弟弟 (dìdi) = younger brother.

questions.question: Which means 'many / much'?
questions.explanation: 多 (duō) = many / much. Its opposite 少 (shǎo) = few.

questions.question: Which family pair means 'son and daughter'?
questions.explanation: 儿子 (érzi) = son, 女儿 (nǚ'ér) = daughter.

questions.question: What does 妹妹 mean?
questions.explanation: 妹妹 (mèimei) = younger sister. Older sister is 姐姐.

questions.question: Which is the pinyin for 高?
Which character means 'good'?
questions.explanation: 好 (hǎo) = good — historically 女 (woman) + 子 (child).

questions.question: Which sentence means 'My older brother is tall'?
questions.explanation: Adjective predicate → use 很, not 是. 的 is typically dropped before family.

questions.question: Which character pair means 'big / small'?
questions.explanation: 大 (dà) = big; 小 (xiǎo) = small. They are the classic size opposites.
